rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract definitions.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference visible ports and features, not implementation-only subcomponents.
Ensure AGREE expressions use visible identifiers and proper types matching AADL declarations.
Define constants and equations in component type scopes when they represent nominal or legal bounds.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume, guarantee, eq, and assign statements within annex agree blocks.
Use visible feature names and typed expressions to avoid type mismatch errors.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing subcomponent ports in component type annexes; use visible variables or outputs instead.
Do not encode AADL properties like timing or unit tokens as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed.
